_comment: Recommended: drop this file at $COWORK_WORKSPACE/.sentinelone/credentials.json — or any folder Cowork has access to under .sentinelone/credentials.json. The plugin's SessionStart hook auto-copies it to $HOME/.claude/sentinelone/credentials.json inside the sandbox at the start of every session. Legacy paths still honoured as fallbacks: ~/.claude/sentinelone/credentials.json, $CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR/sentinelone/credentials.json, ~/.config/sentinelone/credentials.json. Only include the keys you need. S1_CONSOLE_API_TOKEN is the same JWT used for SDL query and config methods (was previously duplicated as SDL_CONSOLE_API_TOKEN, now consolidated).
